images.prompt: A raw, ultra-realistic 8k photograph of a stunningly beautiful, young Japanese gravure idol, showcasing a delicate balance between pure youth and avant-garde artistic elegance. Her wet, straight black hair clings sensuously to her shoulders and collarbone, catching the harsh, brilliant direct hard sunlight that illuminates every pore and fine vellus hair on her flawless, dewy skin.
